{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/187289153?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Susen2", "id": 187289153, "login": "Susen2", "node_id": "U_kgDOCynOQQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Susen2", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

A user with Control Panel access but without permission to view a target private asset can call `assets/preview-thumb` and receive preview HTML that contains a signed fallback transform link for that private asset.

### Details

Root-cause analysis:
1. The endpoint accepts an attacker-controlled `assetId`.
2. Asset is resolved, and thumbnail HTML is returned.
3. No explicit asset-view permission check is performed before preview generation.

### Impact

Type:

1. Missing authorization
2. Unauthorized preview-link disclosure

  Affected deployments:

1. Craft sites with control panel users who have partial permissions and private assets.

  Security consequence:

  1. A control panel user without asset-view permission can still obtain signed preview transform link data for private assets.
  2. This may increase private asset exposure risk depending on deployment and endpoint chaining.

## Resources

title: Craft CMS: Authenticated "assets/preview-thumb" discloses signed fallback transform preview link to CP users without asset-view permission
